summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BISD HUB social media platform. Backend APIs are 94.4% functional with 17/18 tests passing. Frontend registration flow, admin panel, post creation, and basic chat interface working. Main issue is WebSocket connectivity preventing real-time chat features.

minor_bugs.impact: User search may fail for certain terms

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection errors preventing real-time messaging
integration_issues.error_details: Failed to execute 'send' on 'WebSocket': Still in CONNECTING state

integration_issues.issue: Dev OTP not accessible from frontend UI for testing

ui_bugs.issue: Webpack dev server overlay intercepting clicks

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WebSocket connection issues for real-time chat functionality. The WebSocket URL construction or connection handling needs debugging. Also improve user search API to handle edge cases.
